title: The Straw Hats Enter the Sun World
description: On pages 8–10, this part focuses on Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8, Nami, Unknown person #9 as Elbaf’s villages, giant society, Loki’s imprisonment, and the island’s political danger come into focus as the Straw Hats reunite with old allies and new threats.
scene: Elbaf’s villages, giant society, Loki’s imprisonment, and the island’s political danger come into focus as the Straw Hats reunite with old allies and new threats.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I can't even move right now!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: this guy... if he gets these shackles off, I'll give him a quick death!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't care if you can't move. Don't piss me off.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Next time you say something like that, I'll bury you in that tree!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Don't talk back to him, you fool!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why did shanks come all the way out here?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No way was he just running an errand!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...that's not something I can just tell you.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: I don't know who it is!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He looks like he was just struck by lightning!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's gotta be that sun god guy without the mask!!

summary: This part advances the Elbaf Opens through 27 cleaned dialogue beats, emphasizing the core conflict, character stakes, and transition into the next movement of the story.
